rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary: This course is aimed at targeting language functions found in everyday conversation, which help communicate attitudes and intentions in a variety of situations. Students should develop a better understanding of cross-cultural communication through this course through learning naturally flowing conversation patterns and phrases in English.
aims:
To provide students with an environment in which they can communicate in English
To develop English communication skills with a focus on speaking and listening
To provide cultural input related to the target language
To provide opportunities to converse on a variety of topics and use various language functions
To provide activities that foster fluency
To provide activities that improve listening skills
goals: Students will develop English communication skills
Students will improve their English listening skills
Students will improve their English pronunciation skills
Students will increase fluency in English
Students will learn to use language functions

plan.text:
Course introduction, communication techniques
Explanation of course expectations, content, and evaluation

Foundations: Determiners 2
Physical descriptions using comparatives

Foundations: Determiners 3
Physical descriptions using superlatives

Foundations: Verbs - tenses 1
Talking about emotions

Foundations: Verbs - tenses 2
Talking about emotions 2

Final Course Assessment 1
Final evaluation: Group 1 (assessed based off of KU Rubric)

Final Course Assessment 2
Final evaluation: Group 2 (assessed based off of KU Rubric)

textbooks: Class materials are provided by instructor.
prereq: This class is available to first-year students and is a graduation requirement.
prep: Students will be expected to use time outside of class to review conversations learned in class, and encouraged to apply them to everyday situations outside of the classroom.

extra.label: 区分1
extra.text: 平成20年度以降入学生／令和６年度以降入学生

extra.label: 区分2
extra.text: 共通教育）初年次科目／国際コミュニケーション科目基軸英語

extra.label: 履修における注意点
extra.text: １年次に必修。１外国語（英語）履修上限年間10単位。卒業にはⅠとⅡ両方が必要。

extra.label: 資格等
extra.text: 教免－省令で定める科目：外国語コミュニケーション

extra.label: この授業で身につける「10+1の能力」
extra.text:
専門分野に関する知識
人類の文化・社会・自然に関する知識
コミュニケーション力

extra.label: オフィスアワーに関する補足
教員の実務経験の有無
